text: I just got a Mac Mini M4. Can you help me set up LMStudio and get local AI models running?
Let's check your GPU compatibility and install LMStudio. The M4 chip has great Metal support for inference.
I want to build a personal media tracker. Books and movies. PHP, MySQL. Call it MediaLog.
I'll build a full PHP app with MySQL — books, movies, ratings, reviews, data visualizations, custom lists, export to CSV.
Build me a Twitter reader that scrapes Nitter. I want to track Bitcoin accounts.
Building Tweetster with Nitter scraping, topic grouping, read tracking, and dark mode.
Make a Moon Patrol style Bitcoin game
MadPatrol — a retro Moon Patrol clone with Bitcoin theming!
I need a domain. Something short. Help me find one and set up a droplet.
Found 1n2.org — short, memorable. Setting up DigitalOcean droplet with Nginx and SSL.
Build a Curio Cards NFT market dashboard. React. Pull from OpenSea.
CurioCharts — real-time NFT floor prices, volume charts, holder tracking, all 30 cards.
Create an encyclopedia of Curio Cards history. Everything about the project.
Curio Archive — the complete history from 2017 genesis through present day.
Redesign the 1n2.org homepage. Make it look professional.
Product showcase with icons, development timeline, mission statement. 7 projects featured.
Build a site for Thomas Hunt Films. All my YouTube film edits.
38 videos across 7 categories — Star Trek, Star Wars, John Wick, and more. 5.5M total views.
I want a whole Curio ecosystem. Terminal, Atlas, Data API, Review.
Building 4 apps in one session: analytics terminal, network mapper, data API, weekly review generator.
result: 4 Curio apps: Terminal, Atlas, Data, Review

text: More Curio tools. Quant signals, a hub, daily logs. GO.
CurioQuant for AI trading signals, CurioHub as the central ecosystem hub, Daily Logs for our collaboration journal.
Set up OpenClaw with Ollama. I want to run local AI for my pipeline.
Configured OpenClaw gateway with Ollama qwen3.5 model, Telegram bot connected.
Build a retro game lab, Google News scraper, and a Wikipedia for Mad Bitcoins.
Three apps: MB Games (retro game collection), Newszor (news aggregator), MadWikipedia (encyclopedia).
Build a central data warehouse. SQLite. Pull from YouTube, Alchemy, Google News, Twitter.
Data Labs — 16 tables, YouTube API integration for 4 channels, Alchemy for Curio on-chain data, automated collection.
Build Bitcoin Trains. Price chart as a railroad. Train rides the chart.
Arc-length locomotive physics, railroad ties, locomotive with coal tender, boxcars, tankers, flatbed, caboose.
Rebuild the dashboard with dark mode, tabs. Move reader to dashboarder.
Dashboarder — dark navy theme, 6 tabs: Briefing, Personal, Media, Comments, London Theater, Museums.
Add London Theater tracker. Globe Theatre shows. Museum exhibitions.
45 shows with prices and walking distances, Globe 2026 season, 25+ museum exhibitions across London/Amsterdam/Paris.
Show the entire history of bitcoin. Zoom in and out. Make it cinematic.
Full BTC history from $0.05 to $126K. Camera zooms, hero shots, milestones, log scale, 294 data points.
Add Mad Bitcoins as the conductor! Top hat, red goggles, Bitcoin logo, waving!
Mad Bitcoins in the engine window — 5 expressions (₿ eyes, scared, frown, smile, neutral), top hat with ₿, red goggles, suit, waving arm. Dogs in boxcars. Robber on roof. ₿ cargo.
Don't add Mad Bitcoins unless the date is after April 21, 2013. Show title cards for WCN, Bitcoin Group, Curio Cards.
Mad Bitcoins pops in at Apr 21 2013. Title card pauses for 4 personal milestones. 10 Bitcoin history notifications.
result: Personal timeline integrated into BTC history

text: Gather all our data. How long have we been working? How many tokens?
36 chat sessions, ~8.5M tokens, 40 projects, 105K lines of code, 8,475 files — spanning Feb 7 to Mar 8, 2026.
result: Claude Usage page — full collaboration stats
